info.name: rhwp Viewer
info.summary: Open and edit HWP/HWPX files via rhwp WebAssembly.
info.description: Open Hangul Word Processor files (.hwp / .hwpx) directly in Nextcloud Files using the rhwp WebAssembly engine. No external services. Server-side preview thumbnails via the bundled `rhwp` CLI.
info.author: mulatta
